name: newworld-harness
description: Harness engineering marketplace — pre-plan data grounding, plan validation, and debug verification plugins

plugins.name: plan-review
plugins.description: Automatic plan review plugin — validates plans against project directives and codebase structure. Supports parallel review via subagent or team mode. v2.3 adds Phase 6 (Empirical Delegation) for empirical data verification via debug-verify.

plugins.name: debug-verify
plugins.description: Debug verification plugin — validates debugging hypotheses against real data using Advocate + Challenger dual-agent Kapasi Loop. v1.1 adds Pre-Advocate Classifier and Tool Coverage Audit. v1.1.1 generalizes tool categories so MCP and Bash CLI are equivalent fallbacks within each category.

plugins.name: data-grounding
plugins.description: Pre-plan data grounding plugin — collects read-only DB/log/metric facts before plan authoring for debugging-flavored requests, narrowing hypotheses upstream of plan-review/debug-verify. Triggers via UserPromptSubmit hook on debug keywords (≥2 matches) or manual /ground command. Single Grounder agent with read-only enforcement and 12-call total budget.
